reasoning: The deployment of the Coalition of the Willing's "reassurance force" or naval contingent is strictly conditional on a ceasefire or peace agreement ("after the end of hostilities" / "once hostilities have ceased"). It is currently late October 2025, and no such agreement is in place. Given the extensive political, logistical, and military preparations required, it is virtually impossible for a peace deal to be reached and a complex multinational military force to be physically deployed (or naval/air interceptions to commence under the Coalition mandate) in the slightly more than two months remaining in the year. The crowd forecast of 1% accurately reflects these immense constraints.
